sample_rows.Activity Name: Application of Organic Insecticide to Broccoli and Cauliflower
sample_rows.Activity Description:
Application of organic insecticide to broccoli and cauliflower crops to support pest control while maintaining sustainable and environmentally responsible agricultural practices.

---

### **Activity Summary**

Organic insecticide was applied to broccoli and cauliflower plants as part of crop protection and integrated pest management activities.

---

### **Key Components**

- **Activity:** application of organic insecticide
- **Crops:** broccoli and cauliflower
- **Purpose:** pest prevention and crop protection
- **Scope:** sustainable crop management and plant health support

---

| Organic Pest Control, Crop Protection & Sustainable Agriculture Operations

sample_rows.Activity Name: Irrigation, Tank Filling & Hose Installation for Plantain Crops
sample_rows.Activity Description:
Irrigation support activities including filling of water tanks and installation of hoses in plantain cultivation areas to improve water distribution and crop management.

---

### **Activity Summary**

Irrigation operations were carried out alongside water tank filling and hose placement within plantain plots to strengthen irrigation coverage and maintain proper crop hydration.

---

### **Key Components**

- **Activities:**
  - Irrigation
  - Filling of water tanks
  - Installation of hoses in plantain areas
- **Crop:** plantain
- **Product applied:** irrigation water
- **Purpose:** improve water distribution and crop maintenance

---

| Irrigation Infrastructure, Water Management & Crop Maintenance Support

sample_rows.Name: Organic Fertilizer Production & Biofactory Raw Material Organization
sample_rows.Expense Notes:
Work session involving the production of organic fertilizers and the organization of raw materials within the biofactory.

**Details:**

- 6 workers participated
- Payment: DOP$ 500 per person
- Lunch provided: DOP$ 600 total

| Biofactory Production & Labor Operations

sample_rows.Name: Field Operations Report (Cover Collection, Plant Preparation & Banana Planting)
sample_rows.Expense Notes:
Multi-day fieldwork covering Wednesday 10th, Thursday 11th, and Friday 12th, including cover collection and application, banana plantlet (cepa) preparation, field cleaning, microorganism application, and final banana planting activities.

**Summary:**

- Total workforce: 23 man-days
- Total payment: DOP$ 14,105.00
- Activities: soil/cover management, bio-preparation of plantlets, microbial application, and banana planting

| Agricultural Production & Field Operations

sample_rows.Description:
Successful completion and commissioning of the farm’s water reservoir, now fully operational and supporting irrigation needs.

---

### **Activity Summary**

The construction and setup efforts have resulted in a fully functional water reservoir for Kokonut Adelphi. The system is now operational, providing reliable water storage and distribution to support irrigation and overall farm productivity.

---

### **Key Components**

- **Outcome:** fully functional water reservoir
- **Project:** Kokonut Adelphi farm infrastructure
- **Purpose:** water storage and irrigation support
- **Status:** completed and operational
- **Impact:** enables a stable water supply for farm operations

---

| Water Infrastructure Completion, Irrigation Systems & Farm Operational Readiness

sample_rows.Deliverable Name: Dismantling of Small House (Kitchen) for Site Redevelopment
sample_rows.Description:
Removal of an existing small kitchen structure to clear and prepare the area for new construction.

---

### **Activity Summary**

The small kitchen structure was dismantled to free up space and prepare the site for a new planned structure. The cleared area is now ready for redevelopment as part of the farm’s infrastructure expansion.

---

### **Key Components**

- **Activity:** dismantling of small kitchen structure
- **Purpose:** clear space for new construction
- **Scope:** site preparation and infrastructure redevelopment
- **Outcome:** area fully cleared and ready for new build

---

| Site Preparation, Infrastructure Redevelopment & Farm Facility Expansion

Measurement of the total water storage capacity achieved through the completion of the farm’s functional water reservoir.

---

### **Indicator Description**

This indicator reflects the total usable water storage capacity of the farm’s completed reservoir system. A capacity of 5,000 gallons represents the volume of water that can be stored and made available for irrigation and farm operations, ensuring water security and operational continuity during planting and production cycles.

---

### **Activity Summary**

The water reservoir was completed and successfully commissioned as a fully functional system, delivering a total storage capacity of 5,000 gallons to support irrigation needs across the farm.

---

| Water Infrastructure Metrics, Storage Capacity & Agricultural Water Security

F003 - Activity Outputs.value: Dismantling of Small House (Kitchen) for Site Redevelopment

sample_rows.Description:
Measurement of usable land area freed through the dismantling of an existing structure, now available for redevelopment.

---

### **Indicator Description**

This indicator represents the total available surface area gained after the removal of the small kitchen structure. A total of 32.91 square meters has been cleared and is now available for new construction or redevelopment activities within the farm infrastructure plan.

---

### **Activity Summary**

The small kitchen structure was dismantled to clear space for future development, resulting in 32.91 m² of newly available usable land area.

---

| Land Use Optimization, Site Redevelopment & Infrastructure Expansion Metrics

sample_rows.Title: Data Collection and Diagnosis
sample_rows.Description: Gathering information on soil characteristics, climate, water availability, and local biodiversity. An economic feasibility study and market demand analysis are also conducted to ensure sustainable production.

sample_rows.Title: Crop Selection
sample_rows.Description: Choosing the most suitable crops based on agro-ecological conditions, prioritizing species that enhance biodiversity, are resilient, and have high commercial demand.

sample_rows.Description:
Agricultural site preparation activities focused on removing vegetation and obstacles to prepare land for cultivation and infrastructure development.

---

### **Activity Summary**

Land clearing operations were carried out across designated areas of the farm to remove vegetation, debris, and physical obstacles. This work prepares the terrain for planting, infrastructure installation, and further agricultural development activities.

---

### **Key Components**

- **Task:** land clearing
- **Category:** agricultural work
- **Purpose:** prepare land for cultivation and infrastructure development
- **Activities included:**
  - Vegetation removal
  - Obstacle clearing
  - Field preparation and leveling support
- **Scope:** agricultural site preparation and farm development

---

| Land Preparation, Site Development & Agricultural Operations Support

sample_rows.Title: Land Delimitation – Agricultural Field Organization

Expenses.value: Final Quality Check – Perimeter Fence Construction (Extra Helper)

Daily Activity Report.value: Fence Maintenance Work on Farm Boundary

sample_rows.Description:
Agricultural field organization activities focused on defining and marking operational boundaries and cultivation areas within the farm.

---

### **Activity Summary**

Land delimitation activities were carried out to define and organize cultivation zones, infrastructure areas, and operational boundaries across the farm. This work supports efficient land management, agricultural planning, and the proper allocation of productive spaces.

---

### **Key Components**

- **Task:** land delimitation and field organization
- **Activities included:**
  - Boundary marking
  - Plot organization and alignment
  - Identification of operational areas
  - Preparation for agricultural and infrastructure activities
- **Purpose:** improve land management and planning efficiency
- **Scope:** agricultural organization and site preparation

---

| Land Organization, Agricultural Planning & Farm Development Support

sample_rows.Name: Impact management norms
sample_rows.Description: Impacts of enterprises on people and the planet can be understood across five dimensions.

sample_rows.Overview: We joined this round in the Climate Solutions category [We ranked #13](https://gov.gitcoin.co/t/proposal-ratify-the-results-of-gg18-and-formally-request-the-community-multisig-holders-to-payout-matching-allocations/16553) out of \~100
We are participating in Gitcoin Round 19 (GG19). **Climate Solutions by Climate Coordination Network**  Follow Us at Twitter [@KokonutNetwork](https://twitter.com/KokonutNetwork)
